he1e85b1eg17a1g4fb6ga578g3b4f300198fb: May he rest in Summeroak forever. I...
h4ba35c70ga263g4c3ag9100g49b3e8e3c048: ... I apologize. I must have some time to myself.
hd472b711gb68eg43efg89cbg2ce410858a94: I hope to see Halsin return so he can help us heal.
h7060ebd6gc48eg4a81g9dc4g418f1292b5bf: Please, if you find him, let me know.
h3448aa9cgd826g4ab6gaae1gbff4c1a73a5a: To think Kagha had turned to the ways of shadow. Her corruption ran so deep.
hd8d7aeccg8997g40efga6f5g71979bf68f8b: Yet for her to die like this, under the Treefather's gaze... perhaps it is justice.
h30ca8fdfgb7ccg40ffgaa6cgb2846bb3940e: If only justice soothed my heart. A grove drenched in blood is no sanctuary at all.
hbb62a39fgeb6ag43fcg8ef4g9e197b961b19: I pray the Treefather nourishes Kagha's wounded soul, now that she is dead.
h1c72784cg24b9g4fccg801dg25f98c2f869a: You have saved Kagha from herself. I cannot thank you enough.
h3a7dbccdgcc88g4b6bg90a9g1a97944e4cca: I wish I could offer more assistance. For now, I must keep a close watch on Kagha.
h6b03a394g1219g4fb1ga858g7ae9651ae52c: I hope to see both you and Halsin again soon.
h03a9fbf7gea5eg4175g8cebg590e7f6f9a04: Until Master Halsin returns, my eyes must stay on Kagha.
hf60efd2fg17f1g4aceg83eeg686bbd54f2a2: You did well to speak up for the girl. That snake is fickle. A tragedy prevented.
h69cde3d6gd528g4d28g9316g3bbd43d1a069: Well-seen. Well-spotted. We've let a snake replace our leader.
hb2e94238gdf12g438cgafeeg76e5ca9e57f9: And if I hadn't spoken up? What would have happened?
hb88bd748g55c2g4ee0g97ceg0bb3e0108ba6: Nothing befitting a child. Nothing befitting any of our World's creatures.
h19d9f4fdgd00ag4043gb5bdg8b3ab06034ce: We've let a snake replace our leader. She will see the tieflings driven out, or worse.
hbc74f545g2dfag47efg9289ge86a0aed4748: I've heard there's some sort of ritual going on.
haf618a2fg2000g4c10gb3f3g7dede41d42d0: One meant to seal us in. Meant to seal them out. Blasphemous. The Treefather must see what's happening in his holy grove.
h3b207118g4d6cg41c7gad03g6a5d4c5600a4: Perhaps his eyes are on Master Halsin now.
h0d95c0a8g3f7cg4a81g9302g22f9efc9a64f: Mercy on us, Silvanus - mercy, mercy, mercy.
h11530ae4gfc68g4a1fgb706g9122e7a26af6: A child is dead. You don't deserve mercy.
h315d089ag88adg444bgbd1dg6f135e084c83: You may be right. We've let a snake replace our leader. And the result... by the Treefather, that girl...
h3b4bec55g6829g456dg87fag3267eb30609b: That snake must be held accountable.
h5f207d73g829eg4301g8b11g2020bcc59459: By every star, by every vein on every leaf, she must.
hbf264f8cg87dbg423fgb364g9d8f2164ba33: This has only happened because our true leader was taken from us.
h7a74b3d3gb4c6g4b68ga7a7g69febd8f0eef: Kagha seems happy to rule the roost. Who's your real leader?
h04665478ge929g4c50g8be1g163a5f1e919d: Master Halsin. Perhaps goblin-caught, perhaps dead. He'd set... Mistress Kagha back in line. Hold her to task. Stop this damned ritual.
hb3420e47gcbafg43cfgbc7agd06ea8efea14: More will die if the rite is finished. So many more, sent into a world gone mad...
h597a4498gd42cg4564gbcebg55a62007f85d: If no one's looking for Halsin, I could do it.
h9df2bec9geb2eg47f0ga4a8gdf526c2de7a8: Would you? I would give anything to see Halsin return home.
h2a8f8948g2426g44b3g97f7gf698f5a3c41c: No need to fret. I'll find him.
hf597ab70g2bb1g4dd6g8b05g41e19ee17450: Silvanus' blessing upon you. And my gratitude as well.
h8fc9387bg5a7ag4958g9a15gddd24580de90: Halsin is an elf with the presence of a bear. He left west, with the adventurers.
hd303211ag1e89g4c69g9c9dgaf6c8c716440: You won't mistake the First Druid for anyone else.
h5a78dc89g5f57g421cg9859g8dfbdae71846: I'd like a more solid offer than 'anything'.
h562f8de3gf121g4337g9ffegff046dfb2240: Our need is great. I will open the treasures of this grove to you, even if the circle forbids it.
h67a8fbb9g878cg49fcga9d9ge9b8f6c2dd01: Your dismissal is no shield. Kagha will ensure all outsiders are driven from the grove.
h02cf842dgc135g4047g90ffgd985ae2a0745: Should you change your mind, head west. Halsin is an elf with the presence of a bear.
h99ab49cfgb7d4g48a9gab8bg4fc9e876fed0: I found Halsin in the goblin camp, but he can't return yet.
hb1f741fbg3fcdg4de6g9ad3g03390b725814: Please, do whatever you must to get him home. The grove needs him.
hd94a59e0gf62dg45bdg80e9g0ede1e0e8616: I found Halsin in the goblin camp, but he didn't survive.
h8bd424ccg7d3bg494aga7dcgf2522e0cc4b8: I'm in need of a healer. Badly.
hee493b54gb94dg4595ga69eg0c44b4e52774: Like many, you seek Halsin's craft. But you'll have to settle for Nettie.
h81ef2537g584fg4ed7g93b6gbde5986d5bc8: Find her further in the cave. Her gift is great too - you can trust her.
h7adec3ceg67b0g4b1ag8b2cg17e8fe2fc830: Sounds like Halsin might be the better bet. Where is he?
h2f6b8cd8g1181g48c5gb97dg8ba16d11e13f: The adventurers say they lost track of him in a temple to the west.
h00c605a8g2c32g4d77g8d04gd5bfb6490a50: Would that I could track himself myself. But I cannot leave with Kagha doing as she wills.
hcf93feadgd12fg4b16gbb04gdcbcbb8c18d1: I'll take my chances on Nettie.
h258237afgae2bg4a1fgb2f5g43e1b65fccfd: I pray she can heal what ails you.
h390e34cbg91d5g42c2ga4d8g0724da06e198: Ah, I see. You will find her deeper in the caves.
h5ef5743cg1a1cg477agb915ge5475eb933f5: It is what Kagha desires. I doubt it is what Silvanus wants.
h7951a193g577dg4db3gbfd7g45eb6f1c966a: The girl's parents will want vengeance.
hce80d205g87e2g4deagae82g2055e34581d6: This is how a terrible cycle begins. All is out of balance.
h4815585cg758fg4c1dg80d0g36f14c517deb: We need Master Halsin. Without him, Kagha's ritual will divide this grove forever.
h96d88e85g4642g41c0gb849g164a71c89c88: That girl's parents want vengeance - and they deserve it.
h192b4aacg1bc4g41d5ga6b2g85511e69de36: How did Kagha take over the whole grove?
he878b920gc500g41a5gbaecg0bf9195ad6a4: She is First Druid in Halsin's absence. With him caught - or dead - by goblins, none may gainsay her.
h127bdff4g4fd5g4786g81f9ge8a2f6576d7c: But more will die if her ritual is finished. I doubt those exiled by the rite will survive long outside.
h01cb0d7eg0596g4246g9d6bg81262560354b: Preventable. The sickening result of sickening beliefs.
h7e87db85g1621g40bfg9845ged073addf38f: We let this happen. We let this snake replace our leader.
h1ee627bag29b8g4429gb33ag1e92953ee13f: The child is to blame. She shouldn't have stolen in the first place.
